items.title: Julian Champagnie:
items.author: Nate Duncan
items.body_excerpt:
Julian Champagnie:


Regular-season points per GAME: 11


First-quarter points tonight: 13


The only other player with such a low scoring average to score so much in a conference finals or NBA Finals first quarter (play-by-play era) is Meyers Leonard in 2019.

On the Clippers' upcoming offseason, key player decisions, weighing cap space path vs being over the cap, and the case for trading Kawhi Leonard independently of the Aspiration investigation.

items.title: Bam Adebayo is up to 6 All-Defensive selections and three All-Star selections.
items.author: Couper Moorhead
items.body_excerpt:
Bam Adebayo is up to 6 All-Defensive selections and three All-Star selections.

The only players to meet that criteria who are *not* currently in the Hall of Fame:

Rudy Gobert
Draymond Green
Chris Paul
Norm Van Lier
Kawhi Leonard
LeBron James
Alvin Robertson

items.title: Scottie Barnes named to second all-defensive NBA team, just third Raptors (Leonard, 2018; OG 2023) to ever make it. He finished sixth overall in voting with 42 first team votes, 46 second team votes and a mystifying 12 voters left him off ballots completely.
items.author: Doug Smith
items.body_excerpt: Scottie Barnes named to second all-defensive NBA team, just third Raptors (Leonard, 2018; OG 2023) to ever make it. He finished sixth overall in voting with 42 first team votes, 46 second team votes and a mystifying 12 voters left him off ballots completely.
